priority_sources.name: CISA
priority_sources.target: Binding Operational Directive or official guidance tied to the EO

priority_sources.name: OMB
priority_sources.target: Implementation memorandum tied to the EO

priority_sources.name: NIST
priority_sources.target: Framework, criteria, draft guidance, or official technical document tied to the EO

priority_sources.name: Federal Register
priority_sources.target: Published agency action, notice, rule, or related federal document tied to the EO

promotion_rule: No level change without attached primary-source receipt.
